✦ PRODUCT DETAIL & LIFESTYLE — Close-Up & Context

1
Fabric Close-Up
Cotton Texture Zoom
100% Cotton · PFAS-Free
Hypoallergenic

Pure 100% cotton inner layer, zoomed to show the natural fibre weave. PFAS-free certification means zero harmful chemicals — safe for even the most sensitive skin.

2
Layer Explode
3-Layer System
Layer 1 · Outer Shell
Waterproof · Stain-resistant · Durable
💧
▼
Layer 2 · Mid Barrier
PFAS-free · Hypoallergenic · Breathable
🛡️
▼
Layer 3 · Inner Cotton
100% Cotton · Sensory-friendly · Soft
☁️

Our patented 3-layer system: waterproof outer shell, PFAS-free mid barrier, and ultra-soft 100% cotton inner. Each layer serves a purpose — together they protect and comfort.

3
Waistband Detail
Tag-Free · Soft Elastic
🏷️ No Tags
So gentle, they won't even notice

Tag-free, flat elastic waistband designed for sensory comfort. No scratchy labels, no pinching — just a gentle hug that stays put all day.

4
Seam Detail
Flat-Lock Stitching
✓ Flat-Lock
Smooth inside
✗ Raised Seam
Can irritate
✨ No Irritation

Flat-lock stitching lies completely flat against skin. No raised seams means zero chafing — perfect for children with sensory sensitivities.

5
Waterproof Test
Water Beading Demo
💧 Waterproof
Water beads right off!
Outer layer repels liquid completely

Our outer shell is engineered to bead water on contact. Spills, splashes, and rain stay on the surface — never reaching the inner layers.

6
Size Comparison
Laid Flat · Size Guide
2T
3T
4T
5T
6T

Available in sizes 2T through 6T. Our inclusive sizing grows with your child — no need to size up early.

7
Color Swatch Row
3 Colourways
🌿
Forest Teal
Classic
🍃
Spring Green
Fresh
🌙
Ink Night
Bold

Three thoughtfully curated colourways: Forest Teal, Spring Green, and Ink Night. Mix and match or pick your child's favourite.

8
On-Body Front
Child Front View
👶
Natural stance, full coverage

Front view shows our comfortable fit in action. The relaxed silhouette gives kids full range of motion while staying securely in place.

9
On-Body Side
Side Profile · Fit View
🧒
Slim Fit
No bulk · No sag

Side profile reveals the slim, tailored fit. The 3-layer system doesn't add bulk — it fits naturally and moves with your child.

10
On-Body Active
Playing · Moving
🏃 Full Range of Motion

Designed for active play. The flexible 3-layer system stretches, bends, and moves — so kids never feel restricted while running, jumping, or climbing.

☀️
Morning Routine
Getting Dressed Sequence
🪥
Brush teeth
👕
BSL Pants on
👟
Shoes & out the door
Ready in seconds, not minutes!

Part of the morning flow. Easy to pull on, comfortable all day. BSL Pants make the getting-dressed battle one less thing to worry about.

🛁
Bath Time Context
Calming Evening Scene
👖
After bath, cozy awaits

The calm after the splash. BSL Pants are the perfect post-bath garment — soft cotton inner feels like a warm hug after water time.

🎒
School Bag Context
Packed & Ready
Packed & Ready
Extra pair for school

Pack a spare pair in the school bag. Compact, lightweight, and always ready — because accidents happen and kids should never feel embarrassed.

🧺
Laundry Context
Wash-After-Wash Durability
100
washes
100
stays soft
0
damage

Machine washable, tumble dry safe. BSL Pants are built to survive the chaos of family laundry — stain-resistant and gets softer with every wash.

🎁
Gift Wrapping
Gift-Ready Presentation
Perfect gift for little ones

Beautifully packaged and gift-ready. Whether it's a birthday, baby shower, or just because — BSL Pants make a thoughtful, practical gift parents actually love.

✈️
Travel Context
In Suitcase · Portable
✈️ Folds flat · Packs easy

Travel-friendly design folds flat and takes up minimal suitcase space. Pack one for every day of your trip — your child stays comfortable wherever you go.

🌙
Bedtime Context
Nighttime Routine
Cozy cotton comfort all night

The cotton inner layer breathes and stays soft against skin all night. No overheating, no irritation — just peaceful, comfortable sleep for your little one.

🔄
Product Aging
Gets Softer Over Time
✨
New
😊
10 washes
😍
50 washes
🥰
100 washes
Gets softer with every wash! 🌿

Unlike most clothes that wear out, BSL Pants actually improve with age. The 100% cotton inner gets softer and more comfortable with every wash cycle.

"My 5-year-old has autism and tactile defensiveness. We've spent over $800 trying different pants. These are the first ones he doesn't ask to take off. 0 adverse reactions reported

DEEPUGC-18 — Founder Story Photo
👩‍👧‍👦
Lena's Story
Founder & Mom
"I started BKC because my daughter deserved better."
"When my 3-year-old was diagnosed with sensory processing disorder, every morning became a battle over clothes. She'd cry, I'd cry. I spent months researching fabrics, visiting manufacturers, and consulting with OTs. BSL Pants weren't born in a boardroom — they were born from a mom's desperation and a daughter's need."

1
Sense Layer

FSHOP-N — PP E2: Setup Guide

Your BSL Pants arrived! 🎉

Here's how to get started (it's easy).

1

Wash before first use

Cold water, gentle cycle. Tumble dry low.

2

Introduce at a calm time

Not during a fight. Try a relaxed morning.

3

Point out the feeling

"Do you feel that? That means you need to go!"

Watch the 2-min video guide →
Setup guide — 3 clear steps, actionable tips, video CTA. Sets them up for success.

LSHOP-008 — L2 Lisa Mechanism
How BSL Works
This is different from anything you've tried
1. INTEROCEPTION INPUT
Gentle, consistent pressure helps your child recognize body signals they might otherwise miss.
2. CALMING EFFECT
Like a gentle hug that lasts all day — reducing anxiety and supporting self-regulation.
3. BUILT TO LAST
Machine washable, durable fabric that maintains its compression wash after wash.
$34.99 per pair
See the Science
L2 Lisa Mechanism: Product + interoception diagram + "This is different" + CTA

Why BSL Is Different
The missing piece after 40+ methods
OTHER PRODUCTS YOU'VE TRIED:
Weighted blankets

Fidget toys

LSHOP-020 — GF Educational
How BSL Pants Work
For all families, backed by research
SENSORY INPUT
Gentle, consistent compression provides proprioceptive feedback that helps regulate the nervous system.
DAILY SUPPORT
Worn during daily activities — at home, school, or therapy — for ongoing sensory regulation.
PRACTICAL DESIGN
Machine washable, durable fabric. Available in multiple sizes for ages 3-12.
See How It Works
